creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179760
Patch to update databases/postgis22 from 2.2.4 to 2.2.5

Hi Christoph,

I am just sitting at the same update ;) Anyhow, thanks for your patch.

My patch is very similar, but also installs a desktop file and desktop icons. I hope, it is ok, that in that case, I overwrote your patch?



Tested with Poudriere (F10.3i/a, F11.0i/a, and HEADi/a), on HEAD default options, all options enabled and all options disabled.

'portlint -AC' is also fine. The complains are required so far.
